cards.fr: Ce projet a donné naissance à une nouvelle organisation.
cards.en: That project gave birth to a new organization
cards.note: Use 'donner naissance à' to express the idea of something giving rise to something new.

cards.fr: Le programme met l'accent sur l'intelligence artificielle responsable.
cards.en: The program focuses on responsible artificial intelligence.
cards.note: Use 'met l'accent sur' to express focus or emphasis on something.

cards.fr: Ce projet a donné naissance à une nouvelle organisation.
cards.en: That project gave birth to a new organization
cards.note: Use 'donner naissance à' to express the idea of something giving rise to something new.

cards.fr: Le programme se concentre sur l'intelligence artificielle responsable.
cards.en: The program focuses on responsible artificial intelligence.
cards.note: Use 'se concentre sur' to express the program's main focus.
